name: Stephenson's Baked Chicken 'n' Butter and Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Dip the chicken into the water.
2. Coat the chicken with a mixture of flour and seasonings.
3. Place the chicken skin side up in a 13 x 9 x 2 inch baking pan.
4. Dot the chicken with butter.
5. Bake at 425 degrees for 30 minutes, or until golden brown.
6. Remove from the oven.
7. Mix the dry milk powder and hot water together.
8. Pour the mixture around the chicken in the pan.
9. Cover with aluminum foil.
10. Return to the oven and bake at 350 degrees for an additional 45 minutes.
